title: `SELECT ... ORDER BY ... LIMIT ...` query with external sort results in `CORRUPTED_DATA`
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
The query always fails with external sorting.
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
Reproduces in 25.4+.
```
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test SYNC;
CREATE TABLE test
(
`service` LowCardinality(String),
`user_type` LowCardinality(String),
`campaign_id` UInt32
)
ENGINE = MergeTree
ORDER BY (service, user_type, campaign_id)
SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192;
INSERT INTO test SELECT * FROM generateRandom('`service` LowCardinality(String), `user_type` LowCardinality(String), `campaign_id` UInt32', 44, 300, 300) LIMIT 2;
SELECT * FROM test order by campaign_id limit 2 SETTINGS max_bytes_before_external_sort = 120, max_bytes_ratio_before_external_sort = 0.0;
```
### Expected behavior
The query succeeds just as with `query_plan_optimize_lazy_materialization = 0`.
### Error message and/or stacktrace
```
:) SELECT * FROM test order by campaign_id limit 2 OFFSET 2 SETTINGS max_bytes_before_external_sort = 120, max_bytes_ratio_before_external_sort = 0.0;
SELECT *
FROM test
ORDER BY campaign_id ASC
LIMIT 2, 2
SETTINGS max_bytes_before_external_sort = 120, max_bytes_ratio_before_external_sort = 0.
